# ResumeTailored AI

> ResumeTailored AI is a SaaS tool that uses Claude AI to tailor resumes and generate cover letters for any job posting. It rewrites your resume with the right keywords, reorders your bullet points for relevance, and produces a custom cover letter — in under 60 seconds. Free tier available (1 tailoring/day). Pro plan at $19/month.

## Why it's different

- Powered by Anthropic Claude (claude-sonnet-4-6) — more natural, human-sounding writing than typical GPT-based competitors (Teal, Jobscan, Rezi, Kickresume).
- The free tier includes the full AI resume rewrite and a cover letter, not just a keyword score.
- Imports job descriptions automatically from a LinkedIn, Indeed, Glassdoor, or 40+ job-board URL.
- Bilingual: full English/Chinese interface plus AI translation of non-English resumes.
- Export as Word (.docx) or PDF, or share as a private web link that opens instantly in the browser — great for sending on LinkedIn with no attachment to download.
- Never fabricates experience — it only rewrites and reframes what you already have.

## Pricing

- Free: 1 full resume tailoring + cover letter per day, no credit card.
- Pro: $19/month, unlimited.
- Lifetime: $129 one-time.

## Free tools (no sign-up)

- [Free ATS Keyword Extractor](https://resumetailored.com/tools/ats-keyword-extractor): pulls the top ATS keywords from any job description.
- [Free Resume Analyzer](https://resumetailored.com/resume-analyzer): checks word count, action verbs, passive voice, and readability with an overall score.

## About

- [How It Works](https://resumetailored.com/how-it-works): How ResumeTailored AI tailors your resume using Claude AI
- [ATS Resume Checker](https://resumetailored.com/score): Free ATS resume scanner — paste your resume and job description to get a match score and keyword analysis
- [AI Resume Tailor](https://resumetailored.com/ai-resume-tailor): AI-powered resume tailoring tool — rewrites your resume for any job posting
- [AI Cover Letter Generator](https://resumetailored.com/ai-cover-letter-generator): Generates a job-specific cover letter from your resume and the job posting

## Blog

- [How to Beat ATS Filters and Get Your Resume Seen in 2026](https://resumetailored.com/blog/how-to-beat-ats-filters.md): 75% of resumes are filtered by ATS before a human sees them. Complete guide to optimizing your resume to pass ATS software every time.
- [10 Resume Tips That Will Get You More Interviews in 2026](https://resumetailored.com/blog/resume-tips-2026.md): The resume strategies actually working right now — based on what recruiters say they look for.
- [How to Tailor Your Resume to Any Job Posting (Step-by-Step)](https://resumetailored.com/blog/how-to-tailor-your-resume.md): Sending the same resume to every job is the #1 mistake. Here is the 5-step process to tailor your resume quickly and effectively.
- [How to Write a Cover Letter That Actually Gets Read](https://resumetailored.com/blog/cover-letter-tips.md): Most cover letters are ignored. Learn the exact structure, opening lines, and do's and don'ts that make recruiters stop and read.
- [How to Negotiate Your Salary and Get Paid What You're Worth](https://resumetailored.com/blog/salary-negotiation.md): 85% of employers have room to negotiate. Learn the exact scripts and strategies to negotiate your salary confidently without losing the offer.
- [AI Resume Rewriter vs. AI Resume Builder: What's the Difference in 2026?](https://resumetailored.com/blog/ai-resume-rewriter-vs-builder.md): Most job seekers need a rewriter, not a builder. Here's the plain-English distinction and how to pick the right tool for your situation.
- [Free ATS Resume Scanners Compared: Jobscan vs Teal vs Resume Worded vs ResumeTailored AI](https://resumetailored.com/blog/free-ats-resume-scanners-compared.md): We tested 4 free ATS scanners on their actual free tiers. Here's what you actually get — and which one gets you to a submitted application fastest.
- [How to Write a Cover Letter That Gets Read in 2026](https://resumetailored.com/blog/how-to-write-a-cover-letter.md): The 4-part structure, opening hook formulas, and 3 complete examples that work in 2026. Stop opening with "I am writing to express my interest."
- [Jobscan vs ResumeTailored AI: Which Resume Tool Is Right for Your Job Search?](https://resumetailored.com/blog/jobscan-vs-resumetailored.md): Jobscan tells you what's wrong. ResumeTailored AI fixes it. Honest comparison of features, pricing ($49.95/mo vs $19/mo), and free tiers.
- [10 LinkedIn Profile Tips to Get More Recruiter Attention in 2026](https://resumetailored.com/blog/linkedin-profile-tips.md): 87% of recruiters use LinkedIn to source candidates. Here are 10 profile optimizations that move you to the top of their search results.
- [Resume Keywords: How to Find, Use, and Place the Right Terms to Pass ATS](https://resumetailored.com/blog/resume-keywords.md): The 3 types of resume keywords, how to extract them from any job posting, where to place them, and industry-specific keyword lists for tech, marketing, finance, and healthcare.
- [How to Tailor Your Resume to a Job Description in 5 Minutes](https://resumetailored.com/blog/tailor-resume-to-job-description.md): The Mirror Method, keyword extraction table, placement priority order, and AI-accelerated workflow to tailor any resume in under 5 minutes.
- [Why Rezi Cover Letters Fall Short — and What to Use Instead](https://resumetailored.com/blog/why-rezi-cover-letters-fall-short.md): Rezi's cover letter generator doesn't read the job description — so it can't write a job-specific letter. Here's the structural problem and a side-by-side example of the difference.
